ratings.comment: I have a 73% in this class and I have an AB. Not sure if he is a bad professor or not because the curve is so absurd in this class.

I NEVER met such professor like him. He never uploaded correct answers of assignments/exams on canvas. You should never miss every class because he always say things that get you points related to assignments and exams. Even you obtain the right answers if you don't use the method he told in class, you will loss your points. He talks very quickly.
